MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GARDNER DENVER, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

Appearances:
Jeffrey Wehr of Brayton Purcell (898-1555) for plaintiff and responding party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. Plaintiff shifts the burden of production based on the declarations of Sandler and Silloway. Plaintiff presents evidence of triable issue of fact based on the declarations of plaintiff, Aye and Burch. Defendant has failed to present evidence that the dangers of asbestos were known or should have been known to the class of workers performing the tasks plaintiff was performing. The Silloway declaration is silent on what the Navy knew of the dangers of asbestos when purchasing defendant's product. The motion for summary adjudication is denied for it is based on causation. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/AY) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
